biography:
Delightful Baked Goods in Regent Square 🌈🍰✨(v/gf options) breakfast pastries, sweet treats and coffee from @redstartroasters
W-Sat 8a-4p, Sun 9a-2p

top_videos.text:
8 new places in Pittsburgh 🎉
🌊 standing wave coffee opening their second location in lawrenceville 
🍽️ the Eastman is coming to north side
🥭 @mangomangodessertusa is opening in cranberry
🐓 cockys coop is open in market square 
🥯 3 bro
top_videos.author: courtneyncamp

top_videos.text:
Confections is officially open in Regent Square and it’s a certified hit. Casey Renee is a two-time James Beard Semifinalist aka she’s legit. Pulled up at the perfect time as the chocolate chip cookies were fresh out the oven. 

📍 1141 S B
top_videos.author: food4paulrus

top_videos.text: Took a trip to Oakmont Bakery yesterday! They are great there, food and sweets are always fresh. Service is amazing! 🤩 Highly recommend visiting! #pittsburgh #oakmontbakery #sweets #cookies #cakes @OakmontBakery
top_videos.author: kavkas.confections
